name: Fennel Salad

ingredients.item: fennel bulbs (use the longer, thinner male fennel bulb)

method: Serves 4 2 fennel bulbs (use the longer, thinner male fennel bulb) juice of 1 organic lemon 125 ml good-quality virgin olive oil 1 tablespoon wholegrain Dijon mustard salt and ground black pepper 1 tablespoon capers

Cut the fennel bulb in half lengthways and slice as thinly as possible. Mix the remaining ingredients together well to make a sauce and pour over the fennel. Chop some of the fennel’s fine green leaves and sprinkle over the salad.
